pipelineBlockers: no posts registered for lookback period

postsEvaluated.simulationContext: Baseline benchmark — artisanal leather eCommerce, account under 5k followers, LATAM market
postsEvaluated.hookUsed: Close-up of hand-stitching leather — visual hook, seconds 1-2
postsEvaluated.learnings: Process content retains attention at the 3s mark (61% TikTok) but watch time drops before midpoint — hook works, content development does not sustain interest. Saves on Instagram indicate product intent. TikTok outperforms Instagram on discovery metrics for new accounts.
postsEvaluated.boostReason: No real baseline established yet. Do not boost until 10+ organic posts evaluated.

summary.keyInsight: No real posts to evaluate. Pipeline blocked at content registration stage. Priority action: complete claude-client.md and activate Content Creator Agent to generate first registered posts. Social Media Metrics Agent cannot generate real learnings without post history.
